prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG M273 E55** (5.5L V8, M273 KE 55) with a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ supercharger kit** (2.9L Whipple Gen 5 supercharger, 10.5 psi boost, forged internals including Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) pushing **750 HP and 850 Nm of torque** with a **custom ECU flash by Dyno Dynamics** (optimized for 98 RON fuel and aggressive ignition timing maps).

Installation of a **Brembo GT-R 6-piston front / 4-piston rear big brake kit** (400mm front rotors, 380mm rear rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 racing pads** and **Motul RBF 660 brake fluid** for fade-resistant stopping power under extreme heat.

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover system** (3-way adjustable damping, 50mm lowering range, spherical top mounts) paired with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars** and **Meyle HD control arms** to eliminate flex in the **W221 S-Class-derived chassis** under high-G cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Maybach 57S widebody kit** (custom-fabricated front fenders, rear quarter panels, and aggressive side skirts with carbon fiber weave finish) to accommodate **20x10.5 ET25 front / 21x12.5 ET30 rear BBS LM-R wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear)** for maximum mechanical grip.

**Vorsteiner V-FF 103 carbon fiber front lip spoiler** (with integrated LED DRLs) and **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** (modeled after the Mercedes-AMG Project ONE’s underbody aero, reducing lift by 35%) paired with a **Gintani carbon fiber GT-style rear wing** (adjustable angle, 3K twill finish) for downforce optimization.

**LuxuryTec full LED adaptive headlight retrofit** (Osram LEDriving SL 150 bulbs, dynamic cornering, and **custom Maybach S-Class W222-style DRLs**) with **debadged grille (replaced with a custom 3D-printed Maybach ‘S’ emblem in rose gold)** and **BBS LM mesh grille insert** for a stealth OEM+ look.
